name: kami-kakushi
description: Kamikakushi — a grounded, story-driven incremental RPG set in mid-Edo rural Japan. Built agentically.

scripts.build:itch: npm run build && cd dist && zip -r ../kami-kakushi-itch.zip . && cd ..
scripts.verify: tsc --noEmit && eslint . && prettier --check . && vitest run && tsx scripts/verify-content.ts && tsx scripts/gen-docs.ts --check
